gazette: Official Gazette dated 28 April 2023 and numbered 32174
title: Import of saturated polyester resins will be subject to surveillance value
bodyHtml:
Importation of "Saturated Polyester Resins" classified under tariff position 3907.99.80.00.11 will be subject to surveillance as of May 28, 2023.

Importation of saturation polyester resins with a unit customs value of less than 3.5 USD per kg will require a surveillance document. The validity period of surveillance documents will be six months.

Please click for the related communique.
